active.text: STYLE LOCK: Period gothic live-action; candlelight and deep shadows; desaturated cool-brown palette; 19th-century domestic interiors; naturalistic skin and fabric texture; no modern clothing or lighting.

PERFORMANCE LOCK: First-person confessional adaptation—THE NARRATOR often faces and addresses the implied listener/camera when recounting; flashback scenes are objective staging where characters look at each other and scene action, not the viewer. Officers remain calm, civil, observational.
